narrative:
Tate Twp township has 6,304 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
